faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in NoLIta?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in NoLIta typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, and property type. Smaller apartments may fall on the lower end, while multi-unit buildings or extensive infestations requiring wall treatments and follow-up visits cost more. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in NoLIta buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are common in NoLIta due to the neighborhood's abundance of older buildings with wooden structural elements, window frames, and flooring. Moisture from aging plumbing, roof leaks, and humid conditions in basements create perfect environments for carpenter ants to excavate nesting galleries in wood. Regular inspections are essential for historic properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in NoLIta?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout NoLIta for carpenter ant emergencies. Most initial treatments take 1-2 hours depending on property size and infestation extent. Complete colony elimination typically requires 2-4 weeks as our treatments target foraging ants that carry product back to the nest, ensuring the queen and entire colony are destroyed.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ant treatment damage my NoLIta loft or historic apartment?
faqs.answer: Our treatments are specifically designed to be safe for NoLIta's historic buildings and modern loft conversions. We use targeted applications, minimally invasive techniques, and low-odor products that won't damage exposed brick, wooden beams, or vintage finishes. Our technicians are experienced working in sensitive environments including boutiques, galleries, and high-end residences.
